'''shafubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickase|nickase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickase|nickase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shafubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæfibith|shæfibith]] || [[word:shæfibij|shæfibij]] || [[word:shæfibish|shæfibish]] || [[word:shæfibi|shæfibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafufubuth|shafufubuth]] || [[word:shafufubuj|shafufubuj]] || [[word:shafufubush|shafufubush]] || [[word:shafufubu|shafufubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafubuth|shafubuth]] || [[word:shafubuj|shafubuj]] || [[word:shafubush|shafubush]] || [[word:shafubu|shafubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafufbuth|shafufbuth]] || [[word:shafufbuj|shafufbuj]] || [[word:shafufbush|shafufbush]] || [[word:shafufbuf|shafufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shafubuthu|shafubuthu]] || [[word:shafubuju|shafubuju]] || [[word:shafubushu|shafubushu]] || [[word:shafubuku|shafubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shafubuth|shafubuth]] || [[word:shafubuj|shafubuj]] || [[word:shafubush|shafubush]] || [[word:shafubu|shafubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shafubuthul|shafubuthul]] || [[word:shafubujul|shafubujul]] || [[word:shafubushul|shafubushul]] || [[word:shafubukul|shafubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shafubuthuthu|shafubuthuthu]] || [[word:shafubujuju|shafubujuju]] || [[word:shafubushushu|shafubushushu]] || [[word:shafubuku|shafubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shafubuthun|shafubuthun]] || [[word:shafubujun|shafubujun]] || [[word:shafubushun|shafubushun]] || [[word:shafubukun|shafubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shafubuthuoro|shafubuthuoro]] || [[word:shafubujuoro|shafubujuoro]] || [[word:shafubushuoro|shafubushuoro]] || [[word:shafubukuoro|shafubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
